name: Clear World
effectText:
Once per turn, during your End Phase, pay 500 LP or destroy this card. Each player receives effects, depending on the monster Attributes they control.
ā—¸LIGHT: Play with your hand revealed at all times.
ā—¸DARK: If you control 2 or more monsters, you cannot declare an attack.
ā—¸EARTH: During your Standby Phase, destroy 1 face-up Defense Position monster you control.
ā—¸WATER: During your End Phase, discard 1 card.
ā—¸FIRE: During your End Phase, take 1000 damage.
ā—¸WIND: You must pay 500 LP to activate a Spell Card.
